name: USS Cabana (DE 260)
events: 20 Dec 1944 During 20/21 December 1944, USS Greenling (T/Cdr. J.D. Gerwick, USN) and USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Whitman (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Coan, USNR) and USS Cabana (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Bence, USNR). These included night exercises.

21 Dec 1944 USS Charr (Cdr. F.D. Boyle, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Doherty (Lt. W.J. O'Brien, USNR), USS Cabana (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Bence, USNR), USS Sicard (Lt. J.W. Botten, USN), USS YMS 193, USS YMS 235, USS YMS 374, USS Blower (Cdr. J.H. Campbell, USN), USS Ronquil (Lt.Cdr. H.S. Monroe, USN) and USS Threadfin (Cdr. J.J. Foote, USN).
24 Dec 1944 During 24/25 December 1944, USS Burrfish (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Lytle, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor. These included night exercises.
During the 24th, these exercises were carried out with USS Cabana (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Bence, USNR). (1)
